name: Melendez-Diaz v. Massachusetts
question: Is a state forensic analyst's laboratory report prepared for use in a criminal prosecution "testimonial" evidence subject to the demands of the Sixth Amendment's Confrontation Clause as set forth in Crawford v. Washington?
description: A case in which the Court found that a state forensic analyst's lab report prepared for use in a criminal prosecution is subject to the demands of the Sixth Amendment Confrontation Clause.
